things.name: Zeppelin Museum
things.description: World-leading museum on the history of airships with a life-size Hindenburg reconstruction

things.name: Lake Constance (Bodensee)
things.description: Central Europe's third-largest lake with crystal-clear water, beaches and island cruises

things.name: Dornier Museum
things.description: Aviation museum dedicated to the aircraft of Claude Dornier with Do X replica

things.name: Stadtgarten
things.description: Lakeside promenade gardens with a panoramic view of the Alps on clear days

things.name: Schlosskirche
things.description: Baroque palace church and the Moleturm lighthouse on the town harbour

things.name: Island of Mainau
things.description: Flower island in Lake Constance with gardens, butterfly house and Baroque castle

things.name: Meersburg
things.description: Picturesque medieval lakeside town with the oldest inhabited castle in Germany

things.name: Cycleway Around the Lake
things.description: 273km cycle route around the entire lake through Germany, Austria and Switzerland

things.name: Salem Palace
things.description: Former Cistercian monastery and boarding school in a grand Baroque complex

things.name: Ravensburg Old Town
things.description: Nearby well-preserved medieval town with towers, gates and the famous Ravensburger game factory
